subcodes.first_line: A Tablet revealed by the Ancient King unto him who hath turned unto Him and attained unto His Day, which is mentioned in the Books of the Prophets [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لوح انزله مالک القدم لمن اقبل الیه و فاز بیومه المذکور فی کتب النبیین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @proclamation to the people of the world, @chastisement and requital
